differences: Generated HUD now matches the M4 neural-cloud category and fills the panel more convincingly.
The outer node touch points and bright pathways are visible without restoring the removed center core.
The main remaining gap is that live movement must be judged in motion, not from a static screenshot.
suggestions: Keep the precomputed topology and pulse queue model.
Tune only phase constants for future refinements; avoid adding a visible center object.

visual_verdict.reasoning: The final screenshot preserves the simple assistant surface while reaching the M4-style neural field: broad cloud, electric routes, touch flashes, and no history UI.
next_actions: No further visual edit required in this pass.
